achievements: Designed and developed UI/UX interfaces for an AR/VR educational application for school children across multiple grade levels, enhancing engagement through animated and 3D interactive content.
Wrote and maintained C# scripts within Unity 3D to implement scene management, interactive learning modules, and real-time 3D object behaviour.
Integrated AR/VR workflows into the Unity pipeline to deliver immersive educational experiences with 3D animated curriculum-aligned content.
Collaborated on UI/UX design iterations in Figma and implemented responsive, child-friendly interfaces optimised for AR/VR headset and mobile AR platforms.
Modified flight controller and mission-planning code, improving UAV test-flight stability and navigation accuracy by approximately 30%.
Resolved a critical sensor calibration error affecting remote sensing data and improved analysis accuracy by 35–40%.
Enhanced CubeSat module sensor calibration, achieving a 15% improvement in data accuracy and an 8% reduction in data noise during environmental testing.
